citation: USDA SFH GLP — county-specific high-cost-area override (San Francisco CA)
comment: Hand-calc: household_income=$200,000, household_size=4, county=San Francisco (state_fips=06, county_fips=075) -> by_county override found -> applicable_income_limit = $211,800 (override 1-4-person value). 200000 <= 211800 -> income_eligible=True. This pins the override-resolution path: the predicate MUST find the by_county row before falling back to default.
